meaning: n.英国中小学校长,男舍监
examples: He was headmaster of a public school in the West of England.
She passed a cup of tea to the headmaster.
They met with the headmaster during lunchtime.
He was master, then headmaster, at Caldicott Preparatory School at Farnham Royal, Aylesbury Crown Court heard.
Nicholas Weaver, headmaster at Ipswich School, said none of the school's students had been involved.
